# Design Factory Group

> Design Factory Group is a high-end residential and commercial design and build studio, integrating architecture and construction into one coordinated process.

## Pages
- [Home](https://designfactorygroup.com/): Overview of services and approach
- [About](https://designfactorygroup.com/about): Company story and team
- [Projects](https://designfactorygroup.com/projects): Portfolio of ongoing and completed projects
- [Careers](https://designfactorygroup.com/careers): Current job openings
- [Contact](https://designfactorygroup.com/contact): Contact information and enquiry form
